subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the lights of guidance, when the Supreme Horizon was illumined by the Luminary of the Most Great Name that appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الهدی اذا انار الافق الاعلی بنیر الاسم الاعظم الذی ظهر بین
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
